creator: mayhem30@gmail.com
text:
The port devel/rubygem-aws-sdk-proton needs to be removed from /usr/ports/devel/Makefile as it no longer exists.

Synth errors out and won't build anything because of this.

$ synth status
Regenerating flavor index: this may take a while ...
Scanning entire ports tree.
 progress: 31.52%              
culprit: devel/rubygem-aws-sdk-proton
  Scan aborted because 'make' encounted an error in the Makefile.
  devel/rubygem-aws-sdk-proton (return code = 2)
Flavor index generation failed: ports scan
